title: rubus × coactilicaulis
intro: Rubus × coactilicaulis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is a cross between the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus ellipticus) and a yellow raspberry (Rubus coactilicaulis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus × coactilicaulis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Rubus × coactilicaulis can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
